creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 216407
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.19.2

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.19.2 and contains a single fix.

    [BUGFIX] Remote Write: Fix panic when reloading config with modified queue parameters.

Additionally, we finally re-add the BuildDate which had been missing from the version information.
This is done using the SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH and uses the same technique as the www/gohugo port.

-David
